strengths: 15+ years of professional full-stack engineering across web, mobile, and embedded domains — far exceeding the 6-year threshold — with current TypeScript and Node.js production work at re:cinq and Optilyz directly matching the primary stack.

Active AI agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) framework development at re:cinq satisfies the 'Experience with AI agent development' requirement from lived, current production experience rather than theory.

Deep testing culture evidenced by open-source test framework authorship (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), TDD and pairing practice at RIDE Capital, and recurring TDD/kata workshops — strongly aligned with the role's testing-framework expertise requirement.
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere in the resume, and Vitest and Playwright are also absent by name, leaving gaps against specific items in the primary stack checklist.
React appears in only one role (Optilyz); the majority of frontend work references Ember.js, which may indicate narrower recent React depth than the role assumes.
Kotlin is absent from the skills list; only Java is cited, partially covering the Kotlin/Java secondary stack requirement.
response.justification: Bogdan brings over 15 years of professional full-stack engineering, with current TypeScript and Node.js production work at re:cinq and Optilyz — the exact primary-stack languages this role requires. Crucially, his active work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq places him in the rare category of candidates who already satisfy the AI agent development requirement from direct production experience. His consistent testing culture — authoring open-source test frameworks, running TDD workshops, and practising trunk-based development with CI/CD — maps well to a team that values test quality. The gaps in Nest.js and Kotlin are real but shallow: a developer who has shipped production-quality work across this many stacks and paradigms, and who already operates in the same TypeScript/Node ecosystem, is well-positioned to close those gaps quickly.
